title: lachnagrostis rudis subsp. nana
intro: Lachnagrostis rudis subsp. nana, also known as dwarf hair grass, is a type of perennial grass native to New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive issues, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Lachnagrostis rudis subsp. nana are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
